---
title: "Welcome to the Workshop"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

> Meet your instructors and neighbors, and see what to expect from the week.

## Slides

[Make slides full screen](slides.qmd)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

## Before you start

This year the workshop runs entirely in GitHub Codespaces, so there is no
software to install on your laptop. The [Get Started](../../../getting-started.qmd) page
walks through opening the workshop Codespace and setting your OpenRouter API
key. Do that before Module 1.
